signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh to Succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

Powell's term ends in May 2026, and Trump announced Warsh—former Fed governor and prior contender—as his pick via Truth Social, with Warsh now facing a Senate Banking Committee confirmation hearing[3].
